languages.text: "В любом случае, именно ты ныне мо{mf|й|я} наследни{mf|к|ца}, и я признаю тебя в этом праве. Моя память восстановилась без влияния ксеномеханизмов и, уверен, что совет опытного родича может помочь тебе, {name}".

"In any case, it is you who are now my heir, and I acknowledge your right to that title. My memory has been restored without the influence of xenos mechanisms, and I am certain that the counsel of an experienced kinsman may prove of use to you, {name}."
languages.original_text: "В любом случае, именно ты ныне мо{mf|й|я} наследни{mf|к|ца}, и я признаю тебя в этом праве. Моя память восстановилась без влияния ксеномеханизмов и, уверен, что совет опытного родича может помочь тебе, {name}".

traits.locale_text: "In any case, it is you who are now my heir, and I acknowledge your right to that title. My memory has been restored without the influence of xenos mechanisms, and I am certain that the counsel of an experienced kinsman may prove of use to you, {name}."

"In any case, it is you who are now my heir, and I acknowledge your right to that title. My memory has been restored without the influence of xenos mechanisms, and I am certain that the counsel of an experienced kinsman may prove of use to you, {name}."

"In any case, it is you who are now my heir, and I acknowledge your right to that title. My memory has been restored without the influence of xenos mechanisms, and I am certain that the counsel of an experienced kinsman may prove of use to you, {name}."

"In any case, it is you who are now my heir, and I acknowledge your right to that title. My memory has been restored without the influence of xenos mechanisms, and I am certain that the counsel of an experienced kinsman may prove of use to you, {name}."

languages.text: "So oder so seid Ihr nun {mf|mein Erbe|meine Erbin} und ich bestätige Euer Recht auf diesen Titel. Mein Gedächtnis wurde ohne den Einfluss des Xenos-Mechanismus wiederhergestellt, und ich bin sicher, dass sich der Rat eines erfahrenen Verwandten für Euch als nützlich erweisen wird, {name}."
languages.original_text: "In any case, it is you who are now my heir, and I acknowledge your right to that title. My memory has been restored without the influence of xenos mechanisms, and I am certain that the counsel of an experienced kinsman may prove of use to you, {name}."

traits.locale_text: "So oder so seid Ihr nun {mf|mein Erbe|meine Erbin} und ich bestätige Euer Recht auf diesen Titel. Mein Gedächtnis wurde ohne den Einfluss des Xenos-Mechanismus wiederhergestellt, und ich bin sicher, dass sich der Rat eines erfahrenen Verwandten für Euch als nützlich erweisen wird, {name}."

languages.text: « Quoi qu'il en soit, c'est aujourd'hui vous mon {mf|héritier|héritière}, et ce titre vous revient de droit. J'ai retrouvé la mémoire sans l'influence de mécanismes xénos, et je ne doute pas un seul instant que vous saurez entendre les conseils d'un congénère expérimenté, {name}. »
languages.original_text: "In any case, it is you who are now my heir, and I acknowledge your right to that title. My memory has been restored without the influence of xenos mechanisms, and I am certain that the counsel of an experienced kinsman may prove of use to you, {name}."

traits.locale_text: « Quoi qu'il en soit, c'est aujourd'hui vous mon {mf|héritier|héritière}, et ce titre vous revient de droit. J'ai retrouvé la mémoire sans l'influence de mécanismes xénos, et je ne doute pas un seul instant que vous saurez entendre les conseils d'un congénère expérimenté, {name}. »

languages.text: «Sea como sea, mi hereder{mf|o|a} es usted, y le reconozco el derecho al cargo. Mi memoria ha sido restaurada, sin el influjo de mecanismos xenos, y estoy convencido de que la ayuda de un pariente experimentado le será útil, {name}».
languages.original_text: "In any case, it is you who are now my heir, and I acknowledge your right to that title. My memory has been restored without the influence of xenos mechanisms, and I am certain that the counsel of an experienced kinsman may prove of use to you, {name}."

traits.locale_text: «Sea como sea, mi hereder{mf|o|a} es usted, y le reconozco el derecho al cargo. Mi memoria ha sido restaurada, sin el influjo de mecanismos xenos, y estoy convencido de que la ayuda de un pariente experimentado le será útil, {name}».

languages.text: "Her hâlükârda artık vârisimsin ve bu ünvanın hakkın olduğunu kabul ediyorum. Hafızam, zeno mekanizmalarının etkisi olmadan geri geldi. Deneyimli bir akrabanın tavsiyelerinin sana faydası dokunabileceğinden eminim {name}."
languages.original_text: "In any case, it is you who are now my heir, and I acknowledge your right to that title. My memory has been restored without the influence of xenos mechanisms, and I am certain that the counsel of an experienced kinsman may prove of use to you, {name}."

traits.locale_text: "Her hâlükârda artık vârisimsin ve bu ünvanın hakkın olduğunu kabul ediyorum. Hafızam, zeno mekanizmalarının etkisi olmadan geri geldi. Deneyimli bir akrabanın tavsiyelerinin sana faydası dokunabileceğinden eminim {name}."

languages.text: “无论如何，如今你才是我的继承人，我承认你有资格拥有那个头衔。我的记忆已经摆脱异形机制的影响，得以恢复，而我确信，一位经验丰富的族亲所能提供的谏言，定会对你大有裨益，{name}。”
languages.original_text: "In any case, it is you who are now my heir, and I acknowledge your right to that title. My memory has been restored without the influence of xenos mechanisms, and I am certain that the counsel of an experienced kinsman may prove of use to you, {name}."

traits.locale_text: “无论如何，如今你才是我的继承人，我承认你有资格拥有那个头衔。我的记忆已经摆脱异形机制的影响，得以恢复，而我确信，一位经验丰富的族亲所能提供的谏言，定会对你大有裨益，{name}。”

languages.text: 「いずれにしても、あなたは今、私の相続人であり、その称号に対するあなたの権利を私は認めている。異種機械の影響を受けずに記憶が回復した。経験豊富な親族の助言は、あなたにとって役立つかもしれない、{name}。」
languages.original_text: "In any case, it is you who are now my heir, and I acknowledge your right to that title. My memory has been restored without the influence of xenos mechanisms, and I am certain that the counsel of an experienced kinsman may prove of use to you, {name}."

traits.locale_text: 「いずれにしても、あなたは今、私の相続人であり、その称号に対するあなたの権利を私は認めている。異種機械の影響を受けずに記憶が回復した。経験豊富な親族の助言は、あなたにとって役立つかもしれない、{name}。」
